params.headline: Global Market Crash
params.subheadline: Investors react as markets swing and uncertainty spreads.
params.photoCaption: Mission image from the lunar surface.
params.footerLine: Reconstructed in archival print style for dramatic historical storytelling.

columns.title: Impact On Globe
columns.text: Markets react sharply as confidence slips and volatility rises. Analysts warn of cascading consequences across sectors and regions.

columns.title: Investor Reactions
columns.text: Traders scramble to reposition portfolios while regulators monitor the pace of the downturn and calls for stability grow louder.

columns.title: What Comes Next
columns.text: Leaders debate emergency measures as businesses and households brace for aftershocks in the days ahead.
